zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexandra de Arsic於1192年出生在英國奧可福爾可格斯時，她的父親Robert Arsic23歲，母親Sybil de Crevecoeur22歲。她於1246年2月與Robert Tut結婚。她去世於1267年8月14日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexandra de Arsic于1192年出生在英国奧可福爾可格斯时，她的父亲Robert Arsic23岁，母亲Sybil de Crevecoeur22岁。她于1246年2月与Robert Tut结婚。她去世于1267年8月14日之前。

nameMeanings.name: Arsic
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Slovenian (Uršič) and Croatian (Uršić): metronymic from the female personal name Urša, a short form of Uršula (from Latin Ursula, a diminutive of ursa ‘she-bear’; see Urschel ), or, as a Slovenian surname only, a patronymic from the male personal name Urh (see Urch ).

Croatian (Ursić): patronymic from the old male personal name Urso of Italian origin (ultimately from Latin ursus ‘bear’), or a metronymic from the female personal name Ursa, a short form of Ursula (see above).

variants.name: Ursich
meanings: Americanized or Italianized form of Slovenian Uršič or Croatian Uršić and Ursić (see Ursic ).

variants.name: Urschel
meanings: German: from a vernacular pet form of the female personal name Ursula (from a diminutive of Latin ursa ‘she-bear’). Saint Ursula was a 4th-century Christian martyr who was put to death at Cologne.

nameMeanings.name: Alexandra
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Alexander .  It was very little used in the English-speaking world before the 20th century, when it was brought in from Scandinavia and Eastern Europe. It owes its sudden rise in popularity in Britain at the end of the 19th century to  Queen Alexandra ,  Danish  wife of  Edward VII .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexandra de Arsic was born in 1192, in Cogges, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Robert Arsic, was 23 and her mother, Sybil de Crevecoeur, was 22. She married Robert Tut in February 1246. She died before 14 August 1267.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexandra de Arsic est née en 1192, à Cogges, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Arsic, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Crevecoeur, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Tut en février 1246. Elle est décédée avant 14 août 1267.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexandra de Arsic 1192 in Cogges, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Arsic 23 und ihre Mutter Sybil de Crevecoeur 22. Sie hat im Februar 1246 Robert Tut geheiratet. Sie starb vor 14. August 1267.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexandra de Arsic è nata il nel 1192 nel Cogges, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Robert Arsic, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Sybil de Crevecoeur, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Robert Tut nel febbraio 1246. Morì prima del 14 agosto 1267.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexandra de Arsicが1192年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアコグジェズで生まれた時，父Robert Arsicは23歳，母Sybil de Crevecoeurは22歳であった。1246年2月にRobert Tutと結婚した。彼女は1267年8月14日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexandra de Arsic(이)가 1192년 영국 스퍼드실르 코그스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Arsic(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil de Crevecoeur(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1246년 2월 Robert Tut(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1267년 8월 14일 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexandra de Arsic nasceu em 1192, em Cogges, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Arsic, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Crevecoeur, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Tut em fevereiro de 1246. Ela faleceu antes 14 de agosto de 1267.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexandra de Arsic родилась в 1192 г. в местности когесь, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Arsic было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Crevecoeur, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Tut февраль 1246 г. Она умерла перед 14 августа 1267 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexandra de Arsic nació en 1192, en Cogges, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Arsic, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Sybil de Crevecoeur, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Robert Tut en febrero de 1246. Murió antes de 14 de agosto de 1267.
